Board of Commissioners

Meet the Town of Zebulon Board of Commissioners! 

Our Board is made up of Mayor Jessica Harrison, Mayor Pro Tem Quentin Miles, Commissioners Kyle Adams, Shannon Baxter, Amber Davis, and George Roa.

The Town Board sets policies, ordinances, and directives that are carried out by the Town Manager and Zebulon staff. Take a look below to meet our Board and learn more about them!
